instructions: Generate a Next.js page using TypeScript and the Pages Router (pages/ directory)
Import NextPage from 'next' and annotate the component as NextPage<Props>
Use getStaticProps for all data fetching — project is configured with output: 'export' (static site)
Never use getServerSideProps or getInitialProps — they are incompatible with static export
For pages with dynamic routes use getStaticPaths returning fallback: false
Use CSS Modules for page-level styles — import styles from '../styles/{Name}.module.css'
File name must be kebab-case and match the intended URL route (e.g. pages/user-profile.tsx → /user-profile)
Write unit tests in __tests__/pages/{name}.test.tsx using Jest + @testing-library/react
Mock next/router and next/link at the top of every test file
Tests must cover: page renders, props are displayed, navigation links exist
